scripts.cap:sync: npm run build && npx cap sync android
scripts.android: npm run build && npx cap sync android && npx cap open android
scripts.apk: npm run build && npx cap sync android && cd android && gradlew.bat assembleDebug
scripts.apk:desktop: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p=require('path');const src=p.join(process.cwd(),'android','app','build','outputs','apk','debug','app-debug.apk');const d=p.join(process.env.USERPROFILE||process.env.HOME||'','Desktop','Sainur-CRM-1.0.1-19.03.2026.apk');if(fs.existsSync(src)){fs.copyFileSync(src,d);console.log('APK Desktop ga nusxalandi:',d);}else{console.log('APK topilmadi. Avval npm run apk yoki Android Studio da build qiling.');}"
